title: Final Golden Globes Predictions: A Competitive Comedy/Musical Race is No Laughing Matter
text: Best Actor in Musical or Comedy - 2026 Golden Globes Predictions. Predicted Winner: Timothée Chalamet for Marty Supreme. According to the predictions, Chalamet leads the category in Josh Safdie's ping-pong dramedy. The article notes that Chalamet may have the edge — he's earned four Globe acting nominations already. Other Strong Contenders: Leonardo DiCaprio (One Battle After Another), George Clooney (Jay Kelly), Ethan Hawke (Blue Moon), Lee Byung Hun (No Other Choice). Analysis: The article highlights this as part of a broader shift where the comedy/musical categories have become surprisingly competitive and prestigious this awards season, containing some of the season's most exciting contenders — and genuine Oscar hopefuls rather than serving as a consolation bracket for lighter films.
